headline: Trane Technologies Completes Acquisition of LiquidStack
summary: SWORDS, Ireland, March 03, 2026--Trane Technologies (NYSE: TT), a global climate innovator, announced that it has completed the acquisition of LiquidStack, a global leader in liquid cooling technology for data centers, headquartered in Carrollton, Texas. The acquisition was previously announced on February 10, 2026.

headline: Smart Buildings: Leveraging Sustainable AI to Reduce Carbon and Costs
summary: From energy use and asset management to the workplace experience, smart buildings use AI-enabled intelligence to reduce costs and turn sustainability goals into operational outcomes. NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / March 3, 2026 /This article ...

headline: Trane Technologies PLC (NYSE:TT): A Quality Investing Prospect Meeting the Caviar Cruise Filter
summary: Trane Technologies exemplifies quality investing with high returns on capital, strong profit growth, and a robust balance sheet, though its premium valuation warrants careful review.
